description_long: This object consists of four identical cups, each with a rounded body and a single, smoothly curved handle. The cups are stacked in two pairs, with one pair leaning against the other, creating a visually dynamic arrangement. The surface of each cup is matte and uniform, with no visible decorative patterns, branding, or text. The handles are robust and ergonomically shaped, allowing for a comfortable grip. The cups appear to be made from a ceramic or porcelain material, giving them a solid and durable feel. The overall color is a dark, neutral gray, and the finish is smooth with a slight sheen.
description: A set of four matte gray cups with rounded bodies and curved handles, stacked in pairs. The cups are smooth, solid, and free of decoration or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing two pairs of stacked cups, with handles clearly visible and overlapping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the stack and the alignment of the handles on the left.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the open tops of the cups and the arrangement of the handles.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the rear pair of cups, with the handles mostly visible and the cup openings facing forward.
